servers.name: filesystem
servers.description: Read and write files from explicitly granted directories.
servers.author: MCPod maintainers
servers.configMcpod:
name: filesystem
version: 0.1.0
image: mcpod/filesystem:0.1.0
permissions:
  network: false
  mounts: []

servers.name: git
servers.description: Inspect git repositories that are mounted into the container.
servers.author: MCPod maintainers
servers.configMcpod:
name: git
version: 0.1.0
image: mcpod/git:0.1.0
permissions:
  network: false
  mounts: []
